title: disticholiparis benguetensis
intro: Disticholiparis benguetensis, also known as Benguet liparis, is a rare and endangered flowering plant species native to the Philippines. It is a type of orchid, scientifically classified under the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and its extracts can also be used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
